# AVA

This file is a compatibility summary for tools that probe `llms.txt`.

## Current Baseline

1. AVA 3.3 is the baseline core.
2. AVA is a Rust-first solo coding agent with TUI, desktop, and web surfaces.
3. Core customization centers on `MCPs`, `Commands`, `Skills`, and plugins.
4. HQ is no longer part of the default core product surface.

## Current Layout

1. `crates/` — Rust workspace
2. `crates/ava-tui/` — CLI and TUI entrypoint
3. `crates/ava-agent/` — core runtime
4. `crates/ava-llm/` — providers
5. `crates/ava-tools/` — tools
6. `src/` — SolidJS desktop frontend
7. `src-tauri/` — Tauri backend
8. `docs/` — active docs, architecture notes, and archived research

## Read First

1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `docs/README.md`
3. `docs/ava-3.3-plan.md`
4. `docs/backlog.md`
5. `docs/architecture/crate-map.md`
